name: ASUS TX GAMING B760M WIFI D4 Intel B760 (13th and 12th Gen) LGA 1700 mATX Motherboard, PCIe 5.0, DDR4, Wi-Fi 6, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, DisplayPort, HDMI, ASUS THE 7X ONE Edition Motherboard
